themes.title: Trump’s policies dominate global right-wing coverage
themes.blurb: Donald Trump's diplomatic engagements, particularly his high-stakes summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping, and his administration's domestic policies continue to dominate right-wing media narratives across multiple countries. This theme reflects a transnational alignment with Trump's leadership and policy directions, especially in trade, defense, and international relations.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Extensive coverage of Trump's China summit, trade deals, and domestic policies like the SAVE Act and military budget.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Focus on Trump's influence on Poland's foreign policy and internal party dynamics, including reactions to his China visit.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Discussion of Trump's impact on Italy's geopolitical stance, particularly in relation to Meloni's government.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Coverage of Trump's policies as a model for Argentina's economic and diplomatic strategies under Milei.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Analysis of Trump's foreign policy as a reference point for France's right-wing agenda.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Farage's alignment with Trump's policies and rhetoric, particularly on Brexit and immigration.

themes.title: Far-right parties push 'national priority' policies
themes.blurb: Right-wing and far-right parties across Europe and beyond are increasingly advocating for 'national priority' policies, which prioritize citizens over immigrants in access to social services, housing, and employment. This theme highlights a shared rhetorical and policy framework aimed at addressing voter concerns over immigration and resource allocation.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Proposals for 'national priority' in Andalusia elections, focusing on housing, social aid, and public services.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Debates on immigration and national identity, with calls for prioritizing Italian citizens in welfare policies.

countries.name: 🇸🇪 Sverigedemokraterna
countries.note: Policies targeting immigration and welfare access, emphasizing national priority in social benefits.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Campaigns on national preference in social services and housing, aligning with broader European far-right trends.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Focus on restricting immigration and prioritizing Norwegian citizens in public services.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Proposals to lower the age for political office, reflecting a broader push for nationalistic governance.

themes.title: Corruption scandals rock far-right governments
themes.blurb: Allegations of corruption and illicit enrichment are undermining the credibility of far-right leaders and parties in multiple countries. This theme captures the cross-national resonance of scandals involving high-profile figures, leading to internal divisions and public backlash.

countries.name: 🇦🇷 La Libertad Avanza
countries.note: Scandals involving Manuel Adorni and other officials, with allegations of illicit enrichment and misuse of public funds.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Investigations into past government contracts and financial irregularities under Orbán's administration.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Corruption allegations against key figures, including Zbigniew Ziobro, and internal party conflicts.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Internal disputes and allegations of financial mismanagement, including resignations of high-profile members.

countries.name: 🇺🇸 MAGA / Trump
countries.note: Ongoing investigations and controversies surrounding Trump administration officials and policies.

themes.title: Far-right parties exploit immigration tensions
themes.blurb: Immigration remains a central issue for far-right parties, who are leveraging public anxieties to push restrictive policies and anti-immigration rhetoric. This theme highlights the shared strategies and messaging used to mobilize voters around immigration concerns.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Campaigns against immigration and calls for stricter border controls in Andalusia and other regions.

countries.name: 🇫🇷 Rassemblement National
countries.note: Focus on immigration as a key electoral issue, with proposals to limit migrant access to social services.

countries.name: 🇩🇪 Alternative für Deutschland
countries.note: Anti-immigration policies and rhetoric, particularly in regional elections.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Farage's anti-immigration stance and proposals to restrict migrant access to public services.

countries.name: 🇳🇴 Fremskrittspartiet
countries.note: Policies targeting immigration and integration, with a focus on national priority.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Debates on immigration policies and their impact on national identity and security.

themes.title: Right-wing leaders face internal party divisions
themes.blurb: Internal divisions within right-wing and far-right parties are becoming increasingly prominent, with factions competing for influence and challenging leadership. This theme reflects the cross-national pattern of intra-party conflicts that threaten party unity and electoral prospects.

countries.name: 🇵🇱 Prawo i Sprawiedliwość
countries.note: Internal conflicts between factions led by Morawiecki and Czarnek, with Kaczyński struggling to maintain control.

countries.name: 🇪🇸 Vox
countries.note: Resignations and internal disputes over leadership and policy directions, particularly in Murcia and other regions.

countries.name: 🇮🇹 Fratelli d'Italia / Lega
countries.note: Tensions between coalition partners and internal disagreements over policy priorities.

countries.name: 🇬🇧 Reform UK
countries.note: Internal conflicts and resignations over policy directions and leadership decisions.

countries.name: 🇭🇺 Fidesz / Tisza
countries.note: Divisions within the party and challenges to Orbán's leadership following election losses.
